quiz.title: Template Quiz: Just to see how this system work.
quiz.subtitle: Template Quiz
quiz.description: Example quiz template with 2 sample questions. Replace these with your own questions.

questions.text: Example Question 1: What does HTML stand for?
questions.explanation: HTML stands for HyperText Markup Language. It is the standard markup language used to structure content on the web.

wrongAnswerFeedback.B: Incorrect. Replace this with feedback for wrong answer B.
wrongAnswerFeedback.C: Incorrect. Replace this with feedback for wrong answer C.
wrongAnswerFeedback.D: Incorrect. Replace this with feedback for wrong answer D.

questions.text: Example Question 2: Which CSS property controls font size?
questions.explanation: The font-size property sets the size of the font. Replace this explanation with your own.
